widgets.name: ActionChip

widgets.name: AppBar
widgets.description: A Material Design app bar.

properties.name: title
properties.description: {@template flutter.material.appbar.title} The primary widget displayed in the app bar.

properties.name: elevation
properties.description: {@template flutter.material.appbar.elevation} The z-coordinate at which to place this app bar relative to its parent.

properties.name: shape
properties.description: {@template flutter.material.appbar.shape} The shape of the app bar's [Material] as well as its shadow.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: {@template flutter.material.appbar.backgroundColor} The fill color to use for an app bar's [Material].

properties.name: foregroundColor
properties.description: {@template flutter.material.appbar.foregroundColor} The default color for [Text] and [Icon]s within the app bar.

properties.name: centerTitle
properties.description: {@template flutter.material.appbar.centerTitle} Whether the title should be centered.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

widgets.name: Badge
widgets.description: A Material Design "badge".

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: The badge's fill color.

properties.name: textColor
properties.description: The color of the badge's [label] text.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: The padding added to the badge's label.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: Combined with [offset] to determine the location of the [label] relative to the [child].

properties.name: offset
properties.description: Combined with [alignment] to determine the location of the [label] relative to the [child].

properties.name: label
properties.description: The badge's content, typically a [Text] widget that contains 1 to 4 characters.

properties.name: isLabelVisible
properties.description: If false, the badge's [label] is not included.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget that the badge is stacked on top of.

widgets.name: Card
widgets.description: A Material Design card: a panel with slightly rounded corners and an elevation shadow.

properties.name: color
properties.description: The card's background color.

properties.name: elevation
properties.description: The z-coordinate at which to place this card. This controls the size of the shadow below the card.

properties.name: shape

properties.name: margin
properties.description: The empty space that surrounds the card.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget below this widget in the tree.

properties.name: title
properties.description: The primary content of the list tile.

properties.name: strokeWidth

properties.name: thickness

widgets.name: ExpansionTile
widgets.description: A single-line [ListTile] with an expansion arrow icon that expands or collapses the tile to reveal or hide the [children].

properties.name: leading
properties.description: A widget to display before the title.

properties.name: title
properties.description: The primary content of the list item.

properties.name: subtitle
properties.description: Additional content displayed below the title.

properties.name: onExpansionChanged
properties.description: Called when the tile expands or collapses.

properties.name: children
properties.description: The widgets that are displayed when the tile expands.

properties.name: trailing
properties.description: A widget to display after the title.

properties.name: initiallyExpanded
properties.description: Specifies if the list tile is initially expanded (true) or collapsed (false).

properties.name: shape
properties.description: The tile's border shape when the sublist is expanded.

properties.name: collapsedShape
properties.description: The tile's border shape when the sublist is collapsed.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

widgets.name: ExpressCheckoutButton
widgets.description: Conversion-CTA button for platform-native express-checkout flows.

properties.name: onPressed
properties.description: Fires when the user taps the button. Pass `null` (the default) to render the button in its disabled state.

properties.name: paymentMethod
properties.description: Which platform's express-checkout variant to render. Defaults to [ExpressPaymentMethod.auto].

properties.name: label
properties.description: Overrides the platform-default label (for example `'Subscribe with Apple Pay'`). When `null`, a sensible default is chosen based on the resolved payment method.

properties.name: onPressed

properties.name: mini

properties.name: color

properties.name: iconCodepoint
properties.description: Material icon codepoint, e.g. 0xe145 for Icons.add.

properties.name: onPressed
properties.description: The callback that is called when the button is tapped or otherwise activated.

properties.name: tooltip

properties.name: title

properties.name: subtitle

properties.name: trailing

properties.name: shape
properties.description: {@template flutter.material.ListTile.shape} Defines the tile's [InkWell.customBorder] and [Ink.decoration] shape. {@endtemplate}

properties.name: onTap

widgets.name: MaterialApp
widgets.description: An application that uses Material Design.

properties.name: home
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.widgetsApp.home}

properties.name: title
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.widgetsApp.title}

widgets.name: RestageModalSheet
widgets.description: A modal bottom sheet that slides up over a scrim and can be dismissed by dragging it down or tapping the scrim — expressed as a purely declarative surface.

properties.name: open
properties.description: Whether the sheet is shown. `true` slides it in; `false` slides it out (and, once the close animation finishes, removes it from the tree). The sole driver of visibility.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The sheet body.

properties.name: isDismissible
properties.description: When `true` (the default), tapping the scrim dismisses the sheet (fires [onSheetDismissed]).

properties.name: enableDrag
properties.description: When `true` (the default), the sheet can be dragged down and dismissed by swiping downward.

properties.name: showDragHandle
properties.description: Whether a grab handle is shown at the top of the sheet. Null defers to the ambient bottom-sheet theme.

properties.name: dragHandleColor
properties.description: The grab handle's color. Null defers to the theme default.

properties.name: isScrollControlled
properties.description: When `true`, the sheet may grow past half the available height to fit its content (e.g. a scrollable body). When `false` (the default), the sheet is capped at [scrollControlDisabledMaxHeightRatio] of the available height.

properties.name: scrollControlDisabledMaxHeightRatio
properties.description: The fraction of the available height the sheet may occupy when [isScrollControlled] is `false`. Defaults to `9/16`.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: The sheet's background color. Null defers to the theme default.

properties.name: elevation
properties.description: The sheet's elevation. Null defers to the theme default.

properties.name: shape
properties.description: The sheet's shape. Null defers to the theme default (rounded top corners under Material 3).

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: How to clip the sheet's content. Null defers to the theme default.

properties.name: useSafeArea
properties.description: When `true`, the sheet avoids system intrusions on the top, left, and right. Defaults to `false` (edge-to-edge, flush to the bottom).

properties.name: barrierColor
properties.description: The scrim color. Null defaults to a translucent black.

properties.name: barrierLabel
properties.description: Semantic label for the scrim, announced by assistive technology.

properties.name: anchorPoint
properties.description: The point used to disambiguate the sheet's placement on a display with hinges or folds. Null lets the framework choose.

properties.name: enterDuration
properties.description: How long the slide-in takes on a programmatic open. Null uses the framework default (250ms).

properties.name: exitDuration
properties.description: How long the slide-out takes on a programmatic close. Null uses the framework default (200ms).

properties.name: enterCurve
properties.description: The easing curve for a programmatic open. Null uses the platform default (an eased curve); a drag always tracks the finger 1:1 regardless. Set it to tune the open feel.

properties.name: exitCurve
properties.description: The easing curve for a programmatic close. Null uses the platform default. A drag always tracks the finger 1:1 regardless.

properties.name: presentation
properties.description: How the sheet chooses its platform presentation. Defaults to [RestageSheetPresentation.adaptive] (the Material bottom sheet on Android, the Cupertino card sheet on iOS/macOS). Set [RestageSheetPresentation.material] or [RestageSheetPresentation.cupertino] to pin the sheet to that library on every platform.

properties.name: underlay
properties.description: The surface shown *beneath* the sheet, owned by this widget. When non-null and the platform is iOS/macOS, it scales down and rounds as the sheet rises (the iOS card-sheet look); on other platforms it renders plain behind the sheet. Null (the default) is a pure overlay — the sheet floats over whatever is already behind it, with no owned surface and no scale-down.

properties.name: onSheetDismissed
properties.description: Fires when the sheet is dismissed by a downward drag or a scrim tap. Distinct from the paywall-level dismiss: this is the *sheet* closing, not the surface that hosts it. Wire it back to `open = false`.

widgets.name: RestagePager
widgets.description: Multi-page surface that hosts a swipeable sequence of child widgets.

properties.name: children
properties.description: Pages displayed in order. Must be non-empty.

properties.name: initialPage
properties.description: Index of the page shown when the pager first mounts. Defaults to `0`.

properties.name: viewportFraction
properties.description: Fraction of the viewport occupied by each page. `1.0` (the default) shows one full page at a time; smaller values reveal adjacent pages at the edges of the viewport.

properties.name: scrollDirection
properties.description: Direction users swipe to move between pages. Defaults to horizontal.

properties.name: pageSnapping
properties.description: When `true` (the default), the pager snaps to whole-page boundaries instead of allowing partial offsets.

properties.name: onPageChanged
properties.description: Fires with the new page index when the visible page changes.

widgets.name: RestageRadioGroupString
widgets.description: A single-select radio group expressed as a purely declarative surface.

properties.name: items
properties.description: The selectable options, in display order. Each becomes one radio row. An empty list renders nothing.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: The currently-selected option value. The row whose value equals this is checked; `null` (or a value matching no row) leaves the group unselected.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: Fires with the newly-selected value when the user taps a row. `null` disables selection (the rows render but do not respond).

widgets.name: RestageDropdownString
widgets.description: A single-select dropdown expressed as a purely declarative surface.

properties.name: items
properties.description: The selectable options, in menu order. Each becomes one menu item. An empty list renders nothing.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: The currently-selected option value, shown as the field's current value. `null` (or a value matching no option) shows the [hint].

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: Fires with the newly-selected value when the user picks an option. `null` disables the dropdown (it renders but does not open).

widgets.name: RestageToggleButtons
widgets.description: A horizontal set of mutually-independent toggle buttons expressed as a purely declarative surface.

properties.name: children
properties.description: The per-button labels, in display order. Each becomes one toggle button. An empty list renders nothing.

properties.name: isSelected
properties.description: Each button's pressed state, by index, parallel to [children]. Reconciled to [children]'s length when the two differ (pad-with-false / truncate), so a mismatched wire never trips the framework's length assert.

properties.name: onPressed
properties.description: Fires with the pressed button's index when the user presses a button. `null` disables the set (the buttons render but do not respond).

widgets.name: RestageSegmentedButtonString
widgets.description: A segmented button (single- or multi-select) expressed as a purely declarative surface.

properties.name: items
properties.description: The selectable segments, in display order. Each becomes one segment. An empty list renders nothing.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: The currently-selected segment values. Segments whose value is in this list are shown selected; values absent from [items] are ignored. In single-select mode (the default) only the first (in segment order) is honored. `null` (or an empty list) is no initial selection.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: Fires with the whole settled selection — a `List<T>` in **segment order** — when the user changes the selection. `null` leaves the button non-interactive (it renders the initial selection but does not respond).

properties.name: multiSelectionEnabled
properties.description: Whether more than one segment may be selected at once. Defaults to `false` (single-select — the dominant case).

properties.name: emptySelectionAllowed
properties.description: Whether the user may deselect down to an empty selection. Defaults to `false`. (A degenerate wire whose effective selection is already empty is always tolerated regardless of this flag — see the class docs.)

properties.name: showSelectedIcon
properties.description: Whether a checkmark icon is shown on selected segments. Defaults to `true` (the framework default).

widgets.name: RestageDraggableSheet
widgets.description: A persistent, resizable bottom sheet the user drags between a peek size and a fully-expanded size — expressed as a purely declarative surface. Unlike [RestageModalSheet] it never dismisses: it bottoms out at [minChildSize] and stays in the layout.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The sheet body. Wrapped in a [SingleChildScrollView] bound to the sheet's drag controller, so the whole sheet is draggable and the body scrolls once the sheet is fully expanded.

properties.name: initialChildSize
properties.description: The fraction of the parent's height the sheet occupies at rest (the peek). Defaults to `0.5`.

properties.name: minChildSize
properties.description: The minimum fraction the sheet can be dragged to — the persistent floor. The sheet never dismisses below it. Defaults to `0.25`.

properties.name: maxChildSize
properties.description: The maximum fraction the sheet expands to. Defaults to `1.0`.

properties.name: expand
properties.description: Whether the sheet expands to fill the available space in its parent. Defaults to `true`.

properties.name: snap
properties.description: Whether the sheet snaps between [snapSizes] when the user lifts their finger during a drag. Defaults to `false`.

properties.name: snapAnimationDuration
properties.description: The duration of a snap animation. Null lets the framework derive it from the fling velocity.

properties.name: expanded
properties.description: Whether the sheet is expanded. Flip to `true` to animate the sheet to [maxChildSize]; flip to `false` to animate back to [initialChildSize] (the peek). This is the sole programmatic driver; a manual drag is independent. `true` at initial mount shows the sheet expanded instantly, with no animation.

properties.name: expandDuration
properties.description: How long the [expanded]-driven expand/collapse takes. Null uses the framework default (250ms).

properties.name: expandCurve
properties.description: The easing curve for the [expanded]-driven expand/collapse. Null uses the framework default (an eased curve). A manual drag is unaffected.

properties.name: icon

widgets.name: TextField
widgets.description: A Material Design text field.

properties.name: obscureText
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.obscureText}

properties.name: maxLines
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.maxLines} * [expands], which determines whether the field should fill the height of its parent.

properties.name: maxLength
properties.description: The maximum number of characters (Unicode grapheme clusters) to allow in the text field.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.onChanged}

properties.name: onSubmitted
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.onSubmitted}

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

widgets.name: Tooltip
widgets.description: A Material Design tooltip.

properties.name: message
properties.description: The text to display in the tooltip.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: The amount of space by which to inset the [Tooltip]'s message.

properties.name: margin
properties.description: The empty space that surrounds the tooltip.

properties.name: preferBelow
properties.description: Whether the tooltip defaults to being displayed below the widget.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget below this widget in the tree.

structuredTypes.name: TextStyle
structuredTypes.description: An immutable style describing how to format and paint text.

fields.name: inherit
fields.description: Whether null values in this [TextStyle] can be replaced with their value in another [TextStyle] using [merge].

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to use when painting the text.

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.description: The color to use as the background for the text.

fields.name: fontFamily
fields.description: The name of the font to use when painting the text (e.g., Roboto).

fields.name: fontSize
fields.description: The size of fonts (in logical pixels) to use when painting the text.

fields.name: fontWeight
fields.description: The typeface thickness to use when painting the text (e.g., bold).

fields.name: fontStyle
fields.description: The typeface variant to use when drawing the letters (e.g., italics).

fields.name: letterSpacing
fields.description: The amount of space (in logical pixels) to add between each letter. A negative value can be used to bring the letters closer.

fields.name: wordSpacing
fields.description: The amount of space (in logical pixels) to add at each sequence of white-space (i.e. between each word). A negative value can be used to bring the words closer.

fields.name: height
fields.description: The height of this text span, as a multiple of the font size.

fields.name: leadingDistribution
fields.description: How the vertical space added by the [height] multiplier should be distributed over and under the text.

fields.name: foreground
fields.description: The paint drawn as a foreground for the text.

fields.name: background
fields.description: The paint drawn as a background for the text.

fields.name: decoration
fields.description: The decorations to paint near the text (e.g., an underline).

fields.name: decorationColor
fields.description: The color in which to paint the text decorations.

fields.name: decorationStyle
fields.description: The style in which to paint the text decorations (e.g., dashed).

fields.name: decorationThickness
fields.description: The thickness of the decoration stroke as a multiplier of the thickness defined by the font.

fields.name: debugLabel
fields.description: A human-readable description of this text style.

fields.name: shadows
fields.description: A list of [Shadow]s that will be painted underneath the text.

fields.name: fontFeatures
fields.description: A list of [FontFeature]s that affect how the font selects glyphs.

fields.name: fontVariations
fields.description: A list of [FontVariation]s that affect how a variable font is rendered.

fields.name: overflow
fields.description: How visual text overflow should be handled.

variants.description: Interpolate between two text styles for animated transitions.

structuredTypes.name: BorderSide
structuredTypes.description: A side of a border of a box.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color of this side of the border.

fields.name: width
fields.description: The width of this side of the border, in logical pixels.

fields.name: style
fields.description: The style of this side of the border.

fields.name: strokeAlign
fields.description: The relative position of the stroke on a [BorderSide] in an [OutlinedBorder] or [Border].

variants.description: Creates the side of a border.
Linearly interpolate between two border sides.
Creates a [BorderSide] that represents the addition of the two given [BorderSide]s.
A hairline black border that is not rendered.

structuredTypes.name: ButtonStyle
structuredTypes.description: ButtonStyle value.

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.description: Background color.

fields.name: foregroundColor
fields.description: Foreground color (text + icons).

fields.name: padding
fields.description: Padding inside the button.

fields.name: elevation
fields.description: Material elevation in logical pixels.

fields.name: shape
fields.description: Button outline shape.

fields.name: minimumSize
fields.description: Minimum button size (width, height).

fields.name: fixedSize
fields.description: Fixed button size (width, height).

fields.name: side
fields.description: Button border side (color, width, style).

fields.name: textStyle
fields.description: Button label text style.

structuredTypes.name: Size
structuredTypes.description: Size value.

structuredTypes.name: BoxDecoration
structuredTypes.description: An immutable description of how to paint a box.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to fill in the background of the box.

fields.name: border
fields.description: A border to draw above the background [color], [gradient], or [image].

fields.name: gradient
fields.description: A gradient to use when filling the box.

fields.name: backgroundBlendMode
fields.description: The blend mode applied to the [color] or [gradient] background of the box.

fields.name: shape
fields.description: The shape to fill the background [color], [gradient], and [image] into and to cast as the [boxShadow].

variants.description: Creates a box decoration.
Linearly interpolate between two box decorations.

structuredTypes.name: Radius
structuredTypes.description: A radius for either circular or elliptical shapes.

fields.name: x
fields.description: The radius value on the horizontal axis.

fields.name: y
fields.description: The radius value on the vertical axis.

variants.description: Constructs an elliptical radius with the given radii.
Linearly interpolate between two radii.
A radius with [x] and [y] values set to zero.

structuredTypes.name: Decoration
structuredTypes.description: A description of a box decoration (a decoration applied to a [Rect]).

structuredTypes.name: ShapeDecoration
structuredTypes.description: An immutable description of how to paint an arbitrary shape.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to fill in the background of the shape.

fields.name: gradient
fields.description: A gradient to use when filling the shape.

fields.name: shape
fields.description: The shape to fill the [color], [gradient], and [image] into and to cast as the [shadows].

variants.description: Creates a shape decoration.
Creates a shape decoration configured to match a [BoxDecoration].
Linearly interpolate between two shapes.

structuredTypes.name: RoundedRectangleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with rounded corners.

variants.description: Creates a rounded rectangle border.

structuredTypes.name: RoundedSuperellipseBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with rounded corners following the shape of an [RSuperellipse].

variants.description: Creates a rounded rectangle border.

structuredTypes.name: CircleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A border that fits a circle within the available space.

fields.name: eccentricity
fields.description: Defines the ratio (0.0-1.0) from which the border will deform to fit a rectangle. When 0.0, it draws a circle touching at least two sides of the rectangle. When 1.0, it draws an oval touching all sides of the rectangle.

variants.description: Create a circle border.

structuredTypes.name: StadiumBorder
structuredTypes.description: A border that fits a stadium-shaped border (a box with semicircles on the ends) within the rectangle of the widget it is applied to.

variants.description: Create a stadium border.

structuredTypes.name: ContinuousRectangleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with smooth continuous transitions between the straight sides and the rounded corners.

variants.description: Creates a [ContinuousRectangleBorder].

structuredTypes.name: BeveledRectangleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with flattened or "beveled" corners.

variants.description: Creates a border like a [RoundedRectangleBorder] except that the corners are joined by straight lines instead of arcs.

structuredTypes.name: LinearBorder
structuredTypes.description: An [OutlinedBorder] like [BoxBorder] that allows one to define a rectangular (box) border in terms of zero to four [LinearBorderEdge]s, each of which is rendered as a single line.

fields.name: start
fields.description: Defines the left edge for [TextDirection.ltr] or the right for [TextDirection.rtl].

fields.name: end
fields.description: Defines the right edge for [TextDirection.ltr] or the left for [TextDirection.rtl].

fields.name: top
fields.description: Defines the top edge.

fields.name: bottom
fields.description: Defines the bottom edge.

variants.description: Creates a rectangular box border that's rendered as zero to four lines.
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the bottom.
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the right for [TextDirection.ltr] or on the left for [TextDirection.rtl].
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the left for [TextDirection.ltr] or on the right for [TextDirection.rtl].
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the top.
No border.

structuredTypes.name: StarBorder
structuredTypes.description: A border that fits a star or polygon-shaped border within the rectangle of the widget it is applied to.

fields.name: points
fields.description: The number of points in this star, or sides on a polygon.

fields.name: pointRounding
fields.description: The amount of rounding on the points of stars, or the corners of polygons.

fields.name: valleyRounding
fields.description: The amount of rounding of the interior corners of stars.

fields.name: squash
fields.description: How much of the aspect ratio of the attached widget to take on.

variants.description: Create a const star-shaped border with the given number [points] on the star.
Create a const polygon border with the given number of [sides].

structuredTypes.name: LinearBorderEdge
structuredTypes.description: Defines the relative size and alignment of one [LinearBorder] edge.

structuredTypes.name: LinearGradient
structuredTypes.description: A 2D linear gradient.

fields.name: begin
fields.description: The offset at which stop 0.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: end
fields.description: The offset at which stop 1.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane beyond in the region before [begin] and after [end].

variants.description: Creates a linear gradient.
Linearly interpolate between two [LinearGradient]s.

structuredTypes.name: RadialGradient
structuredTypes.description: A 2D radial gradient.

fields.name: center
fields.description: The center of the gradient, as an offset into the (-1.0, -1.0) x (1.0, 1.0) square describing the gradient which will be mapped onto the paint box.

fields.name: radius
fields.description: The radius of the gradient, as a fraction of the shortest side of the paint box.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane beyond the outer ring at [radius] pixels from the [center].

fields.name: focal
fields.description: The focal point of the gradient. If specified, the gradient will appear to be focused along the vector from [center] to focal.

fields.name: focalRadius
fields.description: The radius of the focal point of gradient, as a fraction of the shortest side of the paint box.

variants.description: Creates a radial gradient.
Linearly interpolate between two [RadialGradient]s.

structuredTypes.name: SweepGradient
structuredTypes.description: A 2D sweep gradient.

fields.name: center
fields.description: The center of the gradient, as an offset into the (-1.0, -1.0) x (1.0, 1.0) square describing the gradient which will be mapped onto the paint box.

fields.name: startAngle
fields.description: The angle in radians at which stop 0.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: endAngle
fields.description: The angle in radians at which stop 1.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane in the region before [startAngle] and after [endAngle].

variants.description: Creates a sweep gradient.
Linearly interpolate between two [SweepGradient]s.

structuredTypes.name: Border
structuredTypes.description: A border of a box, comprised of four sides: top, right, bottom, left.

fields.name: right
fields.description: The right side of this border.

fields.name: left
fields.description: The left side of this border.

variants.description: Creates a border.
A uniform border with all sides the same color and width.
Creates a border whose sides are all the same.
Creates a border with symmetrical vertical and horizontal sides.
Linearly interpolate between two borders.
Creates a [Border] that represents the addition of the two given [Border]s.

structuredTypes.name: BorderDirectional
structuredTypes.description: A border of a box, comprised of four sides, the lateral sides of which flip over based on the reading direction.

fields.name: start
fields.description: The start side of this border.

fields.name: end
fields.description: The end side of this border.

variants.description: Creates a border.
Linearly interpolate between two borders.
Creates a [BorderDirectional] that represents the addition of the two given [BorderDirectional]s.

unions.name: Decoration
unions.description: A box decoration: BoxDecoration or ShapeDecoration.

unions.name: ShapeBorder
unions.description: A shape border: rounded, superellipse, circle, stadium, continuous, beveled, linear, or star.

unions.name: Gradient
unions.description: A color gradient: linear, radial, or sweep.

unions.name: BoxBorder
unions.description: A box border: uniform or per-side Border, or text-direction-aware BorderDirectional.

unions.name: OutlinedBorder
unions.description: An outlined shape border: rounded, superellipse, circle, stadium, continuous, beveled, linear, or star.
